response_parsed.reasoning: The call is focused on the onboarding process for Aegis Identity, specifically addressing the setup of Single Sign-On (SSO) and Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) policies. The customers are migrating from Okta and are looking to improve their identity access management, particularly for differentiating access controls between contractors and full-time employees. The discussion includes timelines for implementation and specific requirements for the identity module setup.
evidence_quotes: the SSO piece is probably our biggest priority right now
we've been pretty underwhelmed with it honestly
we want to enforce hardware keys for anything touching production systems
